---
title: "Aqaba Case 001"
---

## Overview

This case demonstrates the intended MANTA Gallery layout.

The water surface is colored by wave amplitude. The landslide layer can be colored by `hm`, `m`, or `Δb`.

::: {.viewer-placeholder}
**Interactive 3D viewer placeholder**


Terrain + wave-amplitude water surface + landslide material layer
:::

## Planned controls

- Play / Pause
- Time slider
- Terrain visibility
- Water surface visibility
- Landslide material visibility
- Water `m` cutoff
- Landslide `m` cutoff
- Landslide color-by selector: `hm / m / Δb`

## Planned visual theme

| Layer | Style |
|---|---|
| DEM bathymetry | `cmocean.deep` |
| DEM topography | `cmcrameri.grayC + relief` |
| Water surface | `dclaw.tsunami` |
| Landslide | `magma` |
